content: The 2018 Nobel Prize in Chemistry was awarded to Frances H. Arnold, George P. Smith, and Sir Gregory P. Winter for their work on the directed evolution of enzymes and the phage display of peptides and antibodies. Frances H. Arnold was the first American woman to win the Nobel Prize in Chemistry.
